name: schema-registry-dag-schema-export-service
description: T207 SchemaExportService — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. Exports schema definitions in requested format (JSON, Avro). Includes version history. Tenant-scoped export.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: format param required (JSON or Avro), includes version history, tenant-scoped export only, no cross-tenant data leakage
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch pattern + schema-export + format-transform + version-history-include + tenant-scoped-export patterns for T207

Break T207 into: receive schemaId+format params → validate format is JSON or Avro → load schema from DATABASE (tenant-scoped) → load version history → transform to requested format → return export payload

Generate schema-export-service.service.ts — HTTP GET via DynamicController, accepts schemaId and format=JSON|Avro params, loads schema and version history from DATABASE (tenant-scoped from ALS), transforms to requested format, returns SchemaExportPayload including version history array. NEVER exports schemas from other tenants. INVALID_FORMAT error for unsupported formats.
Named check validation: format_json_or_avro_validated, version_history_included, tenant_scoped_from_als, no_cross_tenant_export, invalid_format_error_returned
Score generated code 0-100 against T207 iron rules: format validation, version history inclusion, tenant isolation, format transformation correctness
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=format-validated+version-history-included+tenant-scoped, rejected=export-without-version-history OR accepts-any-format-string OR cross-tenant-export. curriculumTier=1.
